'''鈭歫-v-h''' ('''kajavah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:braunch|braunch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:braunch|braunch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-v-h
|-
! Lemma
| kajavah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijavah|thijavah]] || [[word:jijavah|jijavah]] || [[word:shijavah|shijavah]] || [[word:kijavah|kijavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujavah|thuthujavah]] || [[word:jujujavah|jujujavah]] || [[word:shushujavah|shushujavah]] || [[word:kukujavah|kukujavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujavah|thujavah]] || [[word:jujavah|jujavah]] || [[word:shujavah|shujavah]] || [[word:kujavah|kujavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujavah|thujavah]] || [[word:jujavah|jujavah]] || [[word:shujavah|shujavah]] || [[word:kujavah|kujavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejavah|thejavah]] || [[word:jejavah|jejavah]] || [[word:shejavah|shejavah]] || [[word:kejavah|kejavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojavah|thothojavah]] || [[word:jojojavah|jojojavah]] || [[word:shoshojavah|shoshojavah]] || [[word:kokojavah|kokojavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojavah|thojavah]] || [[word:jojavah|jojavah]] || [[word:shojavah|shojavah]] || [[word:kojavah|kojavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojavah|thojavah]] || [[word:jojavah|jojavah]] || [[word:shojavah|shojavah]] || [[word:kojavah|kojavah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:javah|javah]] || [[word:javah|javah]] || [[word:javah|javah]] || [[word:javah|javah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:javah|javah]] || [[word:javah|javah]] || [[word:javah|javah]] || [[word:javah|javah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:javah|javah]] || [[word:javah|javah]] || [[word:javah|javah]] || [[word:javah|javah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:javah|javah]] || [[word:javah|javah]] || [[word:javah|javah]] || [[word:javah|javah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙javah|th忙javah]] || [[word:j忙javah|j忙javah]] || [[word:sh忙javah|sh忙javah]] || [[word:k忙javah|k忙javah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajavah|thathajavah]] || [[word:jajajavah|jajajavah]] || [[word:shashajavah|shashajavah]] || [[word:kakajavah|kakajavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajavah|thajavah]] || [[word:jajavah|jajavah]] || [[word:shajavah|shajavah]] || [[word:kajavah|kajavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajavah|thajavah]] || [[word:jajavah|jajavah]] || [[word:shajavah|shajavah]] || [[word:kajavah|kajavah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajavah|shajavah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajavah|goshajavah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajavah|gokishajavah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajavahn眉|shajavahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajavahnkn眉|goshajavahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajavahn眉|gokishajavahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajavahsh毛|shajavahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajavahnksh毛|goshajavahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajavahsh毛|gokishajavahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajavahro|shajavahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajavahnkro|goshajavahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajavahro|gokishajavahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajavahmu|shajavahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajavahnkmu|goshajavahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajavahmu|gokishajavahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajavahsher|shajavahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajavahnksher|goshajavahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajavahsher|gokishajavahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajavahng|shajavahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajavahnkng|goshajavahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajavahng|gokishajavahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajavahya|shajavahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajavahnkya|goshajavahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajavahya|gokishajavahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajavahyam|shajavahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajavahnkyam|goshajavahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajavahyam|gokishajavahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajavahn眉sh毛|shajavahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajavahnkn眉sh毛|goshajavahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajavahn眉sh毛|gokishajavahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajavahn眉ro|shajavahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajavahnkn眉ro|goshajavahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajavahn眉ro|gokishajavahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajavahn眉mu|shajavahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajavahnkn眉mu|goshajavahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajavahn眉mu|gokishajavahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajavahsh毛n眉|shajavahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajavahnksh毛n眉|goshajavahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajavahsh毛n眉|gokishajavahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajavahsh毛ro|shajavahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajavahnksh毛ro|goshajavahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajavahsh毛ro|gokishajavahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajavahsh毛mu|shajavahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajavahnksh毛mu|goshajavahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajavahsh毛mu|gokishajavahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajavahron眉|shajavahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajavahnkron眉|goshajavahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajavahron眉|gokishajavahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajavahrosh毛|shajavahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajavahnkrosh毛|goshajavahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajavahrosh毛|gokishajavahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajavahromu|shajavahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajavahnkromu|goshajavahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajavahromu|gokishajavahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajavahmun眉|shajavahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajavahnkmun眉|goshajavahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajavahmun眉|gokishajavahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajavahmush毛|shajavahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajavahnkmush毛|goshajavahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajavahmush毛|gokishajavahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajavahmuro|shajavahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajavahnkmuro|goshajavahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajavahmuro|gokishajavahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
